title: Harden mobile viewport sizing and touch ergonomics
description: Use dynamic viewport units for modal, drawer, preview, and panel heights; add touch-only CSS for readable tiny labels, nested-scroll containment, and tactile active states.

title: Add repeatable CSS validation for responsive utilities
description: Introduce a stylelint or CSS smoke gate so responsive CSS changes are validated beyond TypeScript, ESLint, and production build.

title: Move viewport screenshot smoke artifacts into ignored cycle reports
description: Create a dedicated ignored reports/screenshots location and update ad-hoc screenshot helpers to write there instead of leaving root-level untracked artifacts.

title: Reconcile feature/chat-ui-improvements with main
description: Resolve the long-lived branch divergence so responsive UI commits can merge cleanly without local-only deployment workarounds.

title: Add a viewport CSS smoke assertion for dvh utilities
description: Add an automated check that scans responsive modal and drawer surfaces for accidental regressions back to vh-only sizing in touch-critical components.

title: Create an ignored visual-smoke artifact directory
description: Move generated viewport screenshots and helper outputs under an ignored auto-improvement report directory so future UI cycles can capture evidence without dirtying the repo root.

title: Baseline and ratchet workspace ESLint debt
description: Capture current strict lint failures into a baseline and add a changed-file ratchet so future cycles can distinguish new regressions from inherited debt automatically.
